markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To provide a comprehensive overview and workshop on keyword research and assignment generation for GrowthX Content Managers.](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Keyword research is a creative, critical thinking process that cannot be fully automated](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Prioritize understanding client goals, target audience, and pain points before diving into keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [Utilize AI tools to expedite research, but always verify search intent and relevance manually](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
  - [Focus on delivering high-quality, relevant assignments rather than a large quantity of potentially misaligned content](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2016.0)

## Topics

### Current GrowthX Keyword Research Practice

  - [Relies heavily on keyword gap analysis with competitors](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [Extracts relevant URLs and generates assignments using Atlas](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Limitations include over-reliance on competitors, potential keyword intent mismatch, and missed opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Recommended Keyword Research Approach

  - [Start with understanding client goals and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Dig deep into audience pain points and daily challenges](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Use AI (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude) to generate seed keywords and pain point lists](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [Leverage SEMrush and Google to find actual keywords and verify search intent](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Be creative and think outside the box to uncover untapped opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)

### Tools and Techniques

  - [SEMrush Keyword Magic Tool for exploring keyword variations](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Google SERP analysis for verifying search intent](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [AI-assisted research to expedite the process and gain deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Utilize client resources (e.g., sales call transcripts, white papers) for keyword ideas](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2642.0)

### Search Intent and Keyword Selection

  - [Prioritize informational and commercial intent for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Consider zero-volume keywords for potential category ownership](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)
  - [Balance between bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) and brand awareness content](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1553.0)
  - [Critically evaluate keywords against client goals and audience needs](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Client Relationship and Trust Building

  - [Demonstrate understanding of client goals and audience through assignment selection](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2502.0)
  - [Use insights from client conversations to inform keyword choices](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2761.0)
  - [Build trust to gain more freedom in strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/oyptAwmXsmH4SbyrA7ydMNf-m9UUKzVx?tab=summary&timestamp=2587.0)

## Next Steps

  - Implement a more comprehensive keyword research process for upcoming client projects
  - Utilize AI tools to expedite research while maintaining critical thinking and creativity
  - Focus on delivering high-quality, relevant assignments that align with client goals and audience needs
  - Regularly revisit client goals and priorities to ensure keyword strategy remains aligned
